title: Tea and Sympathy
actors: Deborah Kerr, John Kerr, Leif Erickson
plot: A new senior at a boy's prep school, finds himself harassed by the machismo culture of his classmates and the unfeelingly behavior by his father, only being treated with decency by his roommate and with affection by the coach's wife.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award1 win & 2 nominations total
